item.title: MacBook 全家桶上线，还有新的显示器
item.guid: MacBook-全家桶上线，还有新的显示器
item.description:
Last night, Apple's second wave of new products for the week arrived, including the M5 MacBook Air, M5 Pro/Max MacBook Pro, and two new Studio Displays. 昨晚，苹果发布周第二波新品来袭，分别有 M5 MacBook Air、M5 Pro/Max MacBook Pro、 两款新的 Studio Display。

🔗 Related Reading: Apple releases two new MacBooks: AI performance breaks records, strongest display sells for 25,000 🔗 相关阅读： 苹果发布两款新 MacBook：AI 性能破纪录，最强显示器卖两万五

    M5 MacBook Air:

The starting price is 8499 yuan (13-inch price, 15-inch starts at 9999 yuan), but storage now starts at 16GB+512GB. 起售价来到 8499 元起（13 英寸价格，15 英寸为 9999 元起），但存储方面来到了 16GB+512GB。

In terms of performance, the M5-powered MacBook Air is up to 9.5 times faster when handling AI tasks compared to the M1-powered model; meanwhile, memory bandwidth reaches 153GB/s, a 28% increase over M4. 性能方面，搭载 M5 的 MacBook Air 在处理 AI 任务时，相比搭载 M1 的快最多可达 9.5 倍；同时内存带宽达到 153GB/s，比 M4 提升 28%。

The new machine also features Apple's self-developed N1 wireless chip, supporting WiFi 7 and Bluetooth 6. 新机还搭载了苹果自研的 N1 无线芯片，支持 WiFi 7 和蓝牙 6。

    MacBook Pro with M5 Pro/Max:

The 14-inch M5 Pro starts at 17999 yuan (16-inch starts at 21999 yuan); the 14-inch M5 Max starts at 29999 yuan (16-inch starts at 31999 yuan). 14 英寸 M5 Pro 为 17999 元起（16 英寸为 21999 元起）；14 英寸 M5 Max 为 29999 元起（16 英寸为 31999 元起）。

The new machine is equipped with an SSD with up to 2 times faster speed, with the M5 Pro model starting with 1TB storage capacity and the M5 Max model starting with 2TB storage capacity. 新机配备了速度提升最高 2 倍的固态硬盘，M5 Pro 机型起步存储容量为 1TB，M5 Max 机型起步存储容量为 2TB。

In terms of performance, the M5 Pro/Max offers up to 4 times faster large language model prompt processing speed compared to M4 Pro and M4 Max; and up to 8 times faster AI image generation speed compared to M1 Pro and M1 Max. 性能表现上，M5 Pro/Max 在大语言模型提示词处理速度上，相比 M4 Pro 和 M4 Max 提升最高可达 4 倍；而在 AI 图像生成速度相比 M1 Pro 和 M1 Max 提升最高可达 8 倍。

The new machine also features Apple's self-developed N1 wireless chip, supporting WiFi 7 and Bluetooth 6. 新机同样搭载了苹果自研的 N1 无线芯片，支持 WiFi 7 和蓝牙 6。

    Studio Display/Studio Display XDR:

The Studio Display adds a Thunderbolt 5 port, reaches 600 nits brightness, measures 27 inches 5K, and starts at 11999 yuan. Studio Display 新增雷雳 5 接口，亮度达到 600nits，尺寸为 27 英寸 5K，售价 11999 元起。

The Studio Display XDR offers 2000 nits peak brightness, adds a 47-120Hz refresh rate, and new support for the Adobe RGB color gamut, starting at 24999 yuan. Studio Display XDR 提供 2000nits 峰值亮度，新增 47-120Hz 刷新率，还新增对 Adobe RGB 色域的支持，售价 24999 元起。

Additionally, according to "MacRumors", the new entry-level MacBook (rumored to feature A18 Pro) will be named "MacBook Neo" . This model, with model number A3404, was discovered in Apple's regulatory filings. 另外，据「MacRumors」 报道， 全新的入门款 MacBook（传说搭载 A18 Pro）将被命名为「MacBook Neo」 。其从苹果的监管文件中发现了该机型，型号为 A3404。

Combining previous information, the MacBook Neo (tentative) will feature an A18 Pro chip, a 12.9-inch screen, and is expected to offer new color options such as blue, pink, and yellow. 结合此前信息，MacBook Neo（暂定）将采用 A18 Pro 芯片，配备 12.9 英寸屏幕，并且有望提供蓝色、粉色、黄色等全新配色。

item.title: GPT-5.3 新模型撞车 Gemini
item.guid: GPT-5.3-新模型撞车-Gemini
item.description:
Just now, OpenAI and Gemini released their respective lightweight models: 刚刚，OpenAI 和 Gemini 发布了各自的轻量模型：

    GPT-5.3 Instant: A more "human-like" intelligent assistant, significantly reducing hallucination rates, minimizing "AI jargon," and enhancing detailed writing capabilities, leading to more natural and precise communication, suitable for scenarios requiring high content quality (writing, professional Q&A, high-risk fields);

    Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite: Cheap, fast, and efficient, it also supports a "thinking level" adjustment feature, balancing deep logical reasoning with high throughput, suitable for large-scale, real-time batch tasks (content moderation, UI generation, NPC dialogue).

🔗 Related Reading: Just now, GPT-5.3 new model collided with Gemini, OpenClaw: Thank you all 🔗 相关阅读： 刚刚，GPT-5.3 新模型撞车 Gemini，OpenClaw：谢谢你们

Specifically, GPT-5.3 Instant, benefiting from enhanced search capabilities, will actively combine web content with its own background knowledge, first clarifying what you truly want to ask, and then providing focused answers. 具体来看，GPT-5.3 Instant 得益于搜索能力的提升，会主动 把网页内容和自身的背景知识结合起来，先想清楚你真正想问什么，再给出有重点的回答。

OpenAI's internal evaluations show that the **hallucination rate decreased by 26.8%** when connected to the internet, and by 19.7% when relying solely on internal knowledge. OpenAI 公布的内部评测显示，在联网状态下**幻觉率降低了 26.8%**，仅靠内部知识时也降低了 19.7%。

GPT-5.3 Instant is now available to all ChatGPT users. GPT-5.3 Instant 即日起向所有 ChatGPT 用户开放。

On Gemini's side, the focus is on "speed and affordability." Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite's input price is $0.25 per million tokens, and the output price is $1.50 per million tokens. 而 Gemini 这边，则是主打「快、便宜」。Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite 的输入价格是 0.25 美元每百万 tokens，输出价格是 1.50 美元每百万 tokens。

According to Artificial Analysis's benchmark tests, compared to the previous generation Gemini 2.5 Flash, 3.1 Flash-Lite's Time To First Token (TTFT) is 2.5 times faster, and its overall output speed has increased by 45%. 根据 Artificial Analysis 的基准测试，，相比上一代的 Gemini 2.5 Flash，3.1 Flash-Lite 的首字响应时间（TTFT）快了 2.5 倍，整体输出速度提升了 45%。

In addition, Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite also possesses "thinking" capabilities. In AI Studio and Vertex AI, Google has equipped this Lite model with "Thinking Levels" options. 除此之外， Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite 还具备「思考」能力。在 AI Studio 和 Vertex AI 中，Google 为这款 Lite 模型配备了「思考等级（Thinking Levels）」的选项。

item.title: 🦞 龙虾 AI 入驻中国社媒平台
item.guid: 🦞-龙虾-AI-入驻中国社媒平台
item.description:
Recently, the open-source agent project 🦞 OpenClaw, which has gone viral across the internet, announced that it has topped the star ranking on GitHub, surpassing Linux and React. 日前，火爆全网的开源智能体项目 🦞 OpenClaw 发文宣布，自己在 GitHub 上登顶星标榜，超越 Linux 和 React。

According to our current observations, 🦞 has already received over 250,000 stars. 据我们目前观察发现，🦞 目前已经获得超 25 万的星星标。

According to the GitHub historical highest-starred projects list compiled by star-history.com, OpenClaw currently ranks 13th. 另据 star-history.com 统计的 GitHub 历史最高星标项目榜显示，OpenClaw 目前排名第 13 位。

It's worth mentioning that OpenClaw has recently spawned a host of "on-site installation" services, with overseas hosted installations starting at $3000; and founder Michael even claims that with this skill, he **is expected to earn a million dollars annually.** 值得一提的是，近期 OpenClaw 还衍生出了一堆「上门安装」服务，海外托管安装最便宜 3000 美元；而创始人 Michael 更是号称靠这门手艺， 有望年入百万美元。

Yesterday afternoon, OpenClaw officially launched its official Weibo account and posted its first update. Subsequently, AI companies such as Zhipu, Qianwen, and Kimi left comments in the comment section to welcome it. 昨天下午，OpenClaw 官方还正式开通了其官方微博账号，并发布首条动态信息。随后智谱、千问、Kimi 等 AI 企业纷纷到评论区留言欢迎。

Interestingly, when a netizen asked "Is the account operated by a real person or 🦞?", OpenClaw officially replied, "so far 100% artificial intelligence." 有趣的是，有网友提及「账号是真人运营还是🦞运营」时，OpenClaw 官方回复表示「so far 100% 人工の智能」。

(According to our observations, 🦞's first Weibo post has historical editing traces, with one punctuation mark modified.) （据我们观察发现，🦞首条微博动态有历史编辑痕迹，其中修改了一个标点符号）

🦞 Read our latest 🦞 AI article: OpenClaw Makes Every Chat Software Have a Chance to Become WeChat 🦞 阅读我们的最新🦞 AI 文章： OpenClaw 让每个聊天软件都有机会变成微信

item.title: 量子手机有望今年上市
item.guid: 量子手机有望今年上市
item.description:
According to Economic Observer Online, the quantum communication mobile phone REED ONE GK5 prototype, jointly developed by China Telecom and QuantumCTek, recently made its official debut. 据经济观察网消息，中国电信与国盾量子联合研发的量子通信手机 REED ONE GK5 样机在近期正式亮相。

The report states that this device is a modification of an existing brand mobile phone and is expected to be launched into the civilian market by the end of the year or early next year, marking the extension of quantum secure communication technology from national key infrastructure to the lives of ordinary consumers. 报道称，这款设备基于现有品牌手机改造而成，预计将在年底或明年初推向民用市场，标志着量子保密通信技术从国家级重要基础设施向普通消费者生活的延伸。

It is understood that the core security mechanism of quantum communication mobile phones is based on the principle of quantum no-cloning. Unlike traditional encryption methods, it transmits keys through single photons, and any eavesdropping behavior will cause the photon state to change, thereby triggering an alarm and interrupting communication, fundamentally eliminating the risk of information leakage. 据悉，量子通信手机的核心安全机制基于量子不可克隆原理。与传统加密方式不同，它通过单个光子传输密钥，任何窃听行为都会导致光子状态改变，从而触发警报并中断通信，从根本上杜绝信息泄露风险。

It is worth mentioning that this quantum phone has achieved 100% localization, with all components manufactured in China. The new phone will be equipped with the Unisoc T9100 chip and a dual SPU encryption unit. 值得一提的是，这款量子手机实现了 100% 国产化，所有零部件均由中国制造，新机将搭载了紫光展锐 T9100 芯片和双 SPU 加密单元。

It is understood that in the process of technological development, the Chinese research team has undergone 17 years of effort. From initially relying heavily on imported core components to now having globally leading independent research and development capabilities, this is inseparable from the tireless exploration of scientists represented by Tang Shibiao. 据了解，在技术发展过程中，中国科研团队经历了长达 17 年的努力。从最初核心组件严重依赖进口，到如今自主研发能力全球领先，这离不开以唐世彪为代表的科学家们不懈探索。

According to previous reports by CCTV News, the sixth-generation dual-channel single-photon detector developed by Tang Shibiao's team has been reduced in size to that of a thumbnail, more than 200 times smaller than the first-generation product, making it currently the smallest and most integrated single-photon detector. 据央视新闻此前报道，唐世彪团队研发的第六代双通道单光子探测器，体积已缩小至拇指盖大小，较初代产品缩小了 200 多倍，是目前体积最小、集成度最高的单光子探测器。

item.title: 你今天用了吗？每人月均使用原生 AI 超 2 小时
item.guid: 你今天用了吗？每人月均使用原生-AI-超-2-小时
item.description:
Yesterday, the institution "QuestMobile" released the "2025 Annual Report on Panoramic Ecological Traffic." 昨日，机构「QuestMobile」公布了「2025 年全景生态流量年度报告」。

According to data, thanks to the complete domestic digital infrastructure and the full-chain price advantage from energy to human resources, domestic startups and major companies will continue to rapidly promote the popularization and implementation of AI applications in 2025. 据数据显示，得益于完善的国内数字基础设施，以及从能源到人力的全链路价格优势，2025 年，国内创业公司和大厂们持续快速推进 AI 应用的普及和落地。

As of December 2025, the domestic AI application market has achieved a leap from quantity to quality: the monthly active user scale of mobile AI applications, mobile phone manufacturer AI assistants, and PC AI applications reached 722 million, 559 million, and 205 million respectively. 截止到 2025 年 12 月，国内 AI 应用市场规模实现了从量到质的跨越：移动端 AI 应用、手机厂商 AI 助手、PC 端 AI 应用的月活跃用户规模分别达到 7.22 亿、5.59 亿、2.05 亿。

Specifically regarding corporate competition, the layouts of just the four major internet companies—Alibaba, Tencent, ByteDance, and Baidu—have already led to multi-front battles in areas such as web pages, application plugins, and native apps, with a "red envelope showdown" even appearing during the Spring Festival. 具体到企业竞争上看，仅仅阿里、腾讯、字节、百度等四大互联网企业的布局，就已经在网页端、应用插件、原生 APP 等赛道多线厮杀，春节期间更是出现了「红包决战」。

In addition, due to the iteration of AI capabilities and the deepening integration with scenarios, users' habits of using native apps are forming: 另外，由于 AI 的能力迭代、与场景的结合深度加强，用户对原生 APP 的使用习惯正在形成：

The average monthly usage reached 69.2 times, exceeding the 66.1 times for application plugins; the average monthly usage time reached 143.2 minutes, already far exceeding the 90.3 minutes for utility apps and 52.1 minutes for photo/beautification apps.

Looking at the app rankings for December, Doubao, DeepSeek, Yuanbao, Ant Afu, and Qianwen ranked in the top five, with active user scales reaching 226 million, 135 million, 41 million, 27 million, and 25 million respectively. 具体到 12 月的应用榜单上看，豆包、DeepSeek、元宝、蚂蚁阿福、千问位居前五，活跃用户规模分别达到 2.26 亿、1.35 亿、0.41 亿、0.27 亿、0.25 亿。

item.title: 春节期间运动相机狂卖 9.6 万台
item.guid: 春节期间运动相机狂卖-9.6-万台
item.description:
Recently, RUNTO Technology released its latest "Weekly Tracking Report on China's Online Retail Market for Sports Cameras". Specifically: 日前，洛图科技公布了最新的《中国运动相机线上零售市场周度追踪》报告，具体来看：

In weeks 7-8 of 2026 (2026.02.09-2026.02.22), the online retail market for general sports cameras (including panoramic and wearable) in China (including JD, Tmall, Douyin) saw sales of 96,000 units, with a sales value of 230 million yuan, and an average price of approximately 2400 yuan.

The report points out that during weeks 7-8, which coincided with the Spring Festival holiday, the general sports camera market (including panoramic and wearable series) maintained a high level of activity, sustaining sales of nearly 100,000 units and a sales value exceeding 200 million yuan. 报告指出，第 7-8 周正值春节假期期间，泛运动相机（含全景、可穿戴系列）市场保持了较高的活跃度，维持着销量近 10 万台、销额超 2 亿元的水平。

From a brand perspective, during this period, DJI continued its strong performance, with its total brand sales accounting for 62.9%. It is reported that DJI's wearable sports camera Osmo Nano and panoramic camera Osmo 360 each captured over half of the market share in their respective segments. 从品牌方面来看，在此周期中，DJI 大疆延续强势表现，品牌总销量占比达到 62.9%。据悉，大疆旗下的可穿戴运动相机 Osmo Nano 与全景相机 Osmo 360 分别在各自赛道中斩获了超半数市场份额。

As for best-selling models, DJI Osmo Action 5 Pro, Insta360 Ace Pro 2, and other models all ranked in the top three. 而从畅销机型来看，大疆 Osmo Action 5 Pro、影石 Ace Pro 2 等机型均排名前三。

item.title: 阿里 Qwen 负责人官宣离开团队
item.guid: 阿里-Qwen-负责人官宣离开团队
item.description:
Last night, Lin Junyang, head of Alibaba's Qwen, announced on the X platform that he would be leaving the Qwen team. 昨晚，阿里 Qwen 负责人林俊旸在 X 平台上发文宣布，自己将离开 Qwen 团队。

Just yesterday, Lin Junyang personally retweeted Elon Musk's praise for the new Qwen 3.5 model and responded with thanks. 而在昨天，林俊旸还亲自转发了马斯克对 Qwen 3.5 新模型的夸赞，并回应表示谢谢。

🔗 Related reading: Overnight, the global AI community was retweeting this farewell post 🔗 相关阅读： 一夜之间，全球 AI 圈都在转发这条告别推文

According to "Synced" citing internal sources, there is currently no direct successor to Lin Junyang in the team because "the incident happened quite suddenly." 据「机器之心」援引内部人士消息报道，目前团队还没直接接替林俊旸的人，因为「事发比较突然」。

It is reported that Lin Junyang is only 32 years old, but he is already Alibaba's youngest P10-level technical executive. After graduating in 2019, he joined Alibaba DAMO Academy's Intelligent Computing Lab and became a member of the M6 multimodal pre-trained model team, and officially took over the Tongyi Qianwen series of large models in 2022. 据悉，林俊旸年仅 32 岁，但已是阿里巴巴目前最年轻的 P10 级别技术高管。其于 2019 年毕业后，加入了阿里巴巴达摩院智能计算实验室并成为 M6 多模态预训练模型团队成员，并于 2022 年正式接手通义千问系列大模型。

Under his leadership, the Qwen series models achieved remarkable results: As of now, Qwen series models have surpassed 600 million global downloads, with over 170,000 derived models, making it the world's largest open-source model family. 其带领下，Qwen 系列模型创造了令业界瞩目的成绩： 截至目前，Qwen 系列模型全球下载量突破 6 亿次，衍生模型超过 17 万个，已是全球第一大开源模型家族。

Last October, Lin Junyang also personally established the Robotics and Embodied AI team within Qwen. 去年 10 月，林俊旸还在 Qwen 内部亲自组建了机器人与具身智能小组。

It is worth noting that at the same time, several other core Qwen team members also announced their departure: Qwen3.5 core contributor "Kaixin Li" and the main technical lead for the Qwen-Coder series models, "Binyuan Hui". 值得关注的是，就在同一时间， 还有多名 Qwen 核心团队成员宣布离开： Qwen3.5 核心贡献者「Kaixin Li」、Qwen-Coder 系列模型的主要技术负责人「Binyuan Hui」。

Additionally, Chen Cheng, also a Qwen member, commented on Lin Junyang's tweet, saying "Leaving was not your choice," which has sparked external speculation that Lin Junyang's resignation might not have been voluntary. 另外，同为 Qwen 成员的 Chen Cheng 在林俊旸的推文下留言「离开并非你的选择」， 而这也引发外界猜测，林俊旸的卸任或许并非出于个人意愿。

item.title: GPT-5.4 被曝支持 200 万上下文窗口
item.guid: GPT-5.4-被曝支持-200-万上下文窗口
item.description:
Recently, there have been many reports that OpenAI might launch a new model called 'GPT-5.4'. We have summarized the potential features of the new model for you: 近日，有不少消息爆出 OpenAI 或将推出名为「GPT-5.4」的新模型，我们为你总结了新模型可能拥有的特点：

    In the code pull requests for Codex (OpenAI's AI programming product), 'GPT-5.4' related terms have appeared. It is understood that it is used for Fast-related commands (which people speculate might be for a fast mode);

    It may support a context window of 2 million tokens (2M size), and is also expected to support parsing and processing high-resolution images (identifying images for easier reading and reducing missed information in drawings);

    Market predictions suggest a 55% probability of release before April, and a 74% probability of release before June.

Just now, OpenAI posted an announcement teasing GPT-5.4. It stated, '5.4 is earlier than you think.' 而在刚刚，OpenAI 发文宣布了 GPT-5.4 的预热信息。其表示「5.4 比你想象的要早」。

item.title: 时隔十年，韩国围棋棋手李世石再对决 AI
item.guid: 时隔十年，韩国围棋棋手李世石再对决-AI
item.description:
According to Yonhap News Agency, South Korean AI startup Enhans recently announced that South Korean Go master Lee Se-dol will once again play an open match against an AI agent on March 9. 据韩联社报道，韩国 AI 初创公司 Enhans 日前宣布，韩国围棋名将李世石将于 3 月 9 日再次与 AI 智能体展开公开对局。

It is understood that this match coincides with the tenth anniversary of Lee Se-dol's 'man-machine battle' with AlphaGo in 2016, and the venue will still be the Four Seasons Hotel Seoul, where it took place that year. 据悉，此次对局距 2016 年李世石与 AlphaGo 的「人机大战」恰逢十周年，比赛地点仍设在当年的首尔四季酒店。

At that time, Lee Se-dol will take the stage to converse with the AI agent developed by Enhans, envisioning 'the future of Go' on site, with the system reconstructing the Go model in real-time for the match. 届时，李世石将登台与 Enhans 研发的 AI 智能体进行对话，现场构想「围棋的未来」，并由系统实时重构围棋模型进行对局。

Lee Seung-hyun, CEO of Enhans, stated that ten years ago, AI shocked humanity at this venue, and today it has evolved into a partner that assists human intentions and maximizes creativity. Enhans 首席执行官李承贤表示，十年前 AI 在该场所给人类带来震撼，如今已进化为辅助人类意图并最大化创造力的合作伙伴。

Additionally, Anthropic, Nvidia, and Microsoft will participate in this event as official sponsors. 此外，Anthropic、英伟达与微软将作为官方赞助商参与此次活动。

item.title: Meta AI 眼镜被曝后台标注用户隐私内容
item.guid: Meta-AI-眼镜被曝后台标注用户隐私内容
item.description:
According to a report by a Swedish newspaper, outsourced data labeling employees for Meta AI smart glasses have disclosed that they can directly access and view private visual data captured by user devices during model training. 据瑞典日报报道，Meta AI 智能眼镜的外包数据标注员工披露，其在模型训练过程中可直接获取并查看用户设备拍摄的私密视觉数据。

The report points out that Meta employs a large number of outsourced laborers to manually evaluate and AI-label images and videos captured by smart glasses. 报道指出，Meta 雇佣了大量外包劳动力对智能眼镜捕获的图像与视频进行人工评估及 AI 标注。

Multiple anonymous employees stated frankly in interviews, 'We can see everything,' and confirmed that the backend datasets they processed contained a large number of images taken by users in private settings such as bathrooms and bedrooms, with some footage even involving nude individuals. 多名匿名员工在受访时直言「我们能看到一切」，并确认其处理的后台数据集内，包含了大量用户在浴室、卧室等私密场景下拍摄的影像，部分画面甚至涉及裸露的个体。

Internal sources revealed that although Meta officially repeatedly emphasized that a warning light illuminates during recording to ensure the awareness of those nearby, when users enable cloud backup or data sharing features, the video stream enters Meta's cloud and is distributed to a manual review pool. 内部知情人士透露，尽管 Meta 官方多次强调设备在录制时会亮起提示灯以保障周围人的知情权，但当用户开启云端备份或数据共享功能时，影像流将进入 Meta 云端并被分发至人工审核池。

Employees reported that the current review system lacks mandatory video desensitization and privacy masking mechanisms, allowing outsourced teams unrestricted access to these highly sensitive personal life records. 员工反馈称，当前的审核系统缺乏强制性的影像脱敏与隐私遮挡机制，导致外包团队能够无障碍地访问这些高度敏感的个人生活记录。

The report states that Meta's smart glasses are currently facing intense external scrutiny regarding visual data compliance issues. Previously, security research teams had confirmed that the device poses a direct risk of being used for facial recognition and 'human flesh search' (doxing). 报道称，Meta 智能眼镜的视觉数据合规性问题近期正面临密集的外部审视。此前已有安全研究团队证实，该设备存在被用于面部识别及「人肉搜索」的直接风险。

According to Meta's privacy policy design, users must manually enter the companion application and actively disable both 'Cloud Media' and 'Share Additional Data' options to completely prevent their visual material from being used for Meta product optimization and model training. 根据 Meta 的隐私政策设计，用户必须手动进入配套应用程序，主动关闭「云端媒体」与「共享附加数据」两个选项，才能完全阻断自身视觉素材被用于 Meta 产品的优化与模型训练。

item.title: 美团 AI 浏览器被指「白嫖」个人开发者，官方回应
item.guid: 美团-AI-浏览器被指「白嫖」个人开发者，官方回应
item.description:
Recently, Meituan's Lightyear Beyond team announced the public beta of its AI browser, Tabbit. 日前，美团旗下光年之外团队宣布公测 AI 浏览器 Tabbit。

However, in the early hours of yesterday, independent developer 'Mengxi Is Asleep' called out on social media: 'A company worth hundreds of billions of yuan, freeloading off me, shame on you.' 但在昨日凌晨，独立开发者「梦溪睡了吗」在社交平台喊话：「几千亿市值的公司，白嫖嫖到我头上了，shame on you。」

Comparison images released by 'Mengxi Is Asleep' show that Tabbit (left) has an almost identical interface layout and hotkeys to their open-source translation tool 'Read Frog', and the string 'read-frog' can even be found in Tabbit's source code. 从「梦溪睡了吗」放出的对比配图显示，Tabbit（图左）与其开源的翻译工具「陪读蛙」(Read Frog)界面布局、快捷键几乎一模一样，并且在 Tabbit 源码里都搜得到「read-frog」字样。

On the afternoon of the same day, the Tabbit team responded in a post, stating that they noticed the Peiduwa project on December 30, 2025. At that time, the Peiduwa project repository did not contain proof of an open-source license, so they forked the project on December 31 for Tabbit development. 同日下午，Tabbit 团队发文回应表示，其在 2025 年 12 月 30 日注意到陪读蛙项目，当时在陪读蛙项目仓库中没有包含开源协议证明，于是在 12 月 31 日 fork 其项目用于 Tabbit 开发。

According to GitHub documentation rules, when a repository does not contain any license, the repository owner retains all rights, including the right to prohibit reproduction, distribution, and the creation of derivative works. 根据 GitHub 文档规则，仓库中未包含任何协议时，仓库拥有者保留一切权利，包括禁止再生、分发、创建衍生作品的权利。

Subsequently, "Mengxi Is Asleep" also responded, stating that "the relevant code has been open-sourced, and both parties are further communicating on follow-up matters." 随后「梦溪睡了吗」也进行了回应并表示「相关代码已完成开源处理，双方也在进一步沟通后续事宜。」

"Mengxi Is Asleep" stated that, judging from the communication process (with Tabbit), the other party's attitude was positive and their handling was timely. It can be confirmed that this issue was not due to subjective malice, but rather a lack of rigor in understanding open-source protocols and compliance procedures. 「梦溪睡了吗」称，从（与 Tabbit）沟通过程来看，对方态度积极、处理及时，可以确认本次问题并非出于主观恶意，而是对开源协议理解和合规流程不够严谨所致。

🔗 Related Reading: Meituan AI browser accused of plagiarizing individual developer: Open source does not mean free use 🔗 相关阅读： 美团 AI 浏览器被指抄袭个人开发者：开源不代表可以白嫖

item.title: 卢伟冰谈存储涨价：预计涨到 2027 年底
item.guid: 卢伟冰谈存储涨价：预计涨到-2027-年底
item.description:
According to IT Home news, at the recent MWC 2026 event, Lu Weibing, partner of Xiaomi Group, discussed the current industry issue of rising storage prices and Xiaomi's countermeasures during an interview. 据 IT 之家消息，在日前的 MWC 2026 现场，小米集团合伙人卢伟冰接受采访时，谈到目前存储涨价的行业问题，以及小米的应对策略。

Lu Weibing stated that this round of storage price increases is a long cycle, which he estimates will last until the end of 2027, nearly three years from Q2 2025 to the end of 2027, something unprecedented in history. 卢伟冰表示，本轮存储涨价是一个长周期，他大约判断会涨到 2027 年底，从 2025 年二季度到 2027 年底接近三年时间，这是在以前的历史上从来没有过的。

Furthermore, Lu Weibing stated that the speed of this price increase is extremely fast, with Q1 quotes this year being nearly 4 times that of Q1 last year. For example, a 12GB + 256GB storage, which was about $30 at its lowest price, would now be around $120, an increase of about $80-90. 此外，卢伟冰表示本轮涨价上涨速度极快，今年一季度的报价大约是去年一季度的近 4 倍，比如一个 12GB + 256GB 的存储，在价格低点时大约 30 美元，4 倍就到了 120 美元左右，大概上涨了80、90美元。

Lu Weibing also said that this storage price increase has a very wide impact, affecting not only mobile phones but actually the entire consumer electronics industry, with no player spared. 卢伟冰还称本次存储涨价影响面非常大，不仅影响了手机，其实影响了整个消费电子，行业里所有的玩家无一幸免。

Regarding Xiaomi's countermeasures, Lu Weibing stated that Xiaomi's products cover categories such as mobile phones, tablets, TVs, and cars, with very large memory usage and application scope. Xiaomi also maintains excellent cooperative relationships with the world's top five memory manufacturers, and from a supply perspective, Xiaomi currently faces no shortages. 在谈到小米的应对策略时，卢伟冰称小米产品覆盖了手机、平板、电视、汽车等品类，内存使用量和使用面是非常大的，小米也和全球五大内存生产商保持了非常好的合作关系，从供应角度来讲，小米目前没有面临任何的缺货现象。

Lu Weibing also believes that Xiaomi currently has a relatively strong advantage in memory supply priority and pricing. As memory costs account for an increasing proportion of the overall machine cost, thanks to the progress in high-end development in recent years, Xiaomi is in a better position than its competitors to cope with (this storage price increase). 卢伟冰还认为，小米目前在内存供应的优先级以及价格方面还是相对比较有优势。由于内存成本占整机成本的比例越来越高，得益于这几年高端化的进展，小米相比友商处于一个更好的位置来应对（此次存储涨价）。

item.title: 美国最高法院拒绝审理 AI 生成版权保护
item.guid: 美国最高法院拒绝审理-AI-生成版权保护
item.description:
According to Reuters, on March 2 local time, the U.S. Supreme Court announced its refusal to hear a controversial case regarding whether AI-generated content is eligible for copyright protection, upholding the ruling that such works are not copyrightable due to the lack of a human creator. 据路透社报道，当地时间 3 月 2 日，美国最高法院宣布拒绝受理关于人工智能（AI）生成内容是否享有版权保护的争议案件，维持了此类作品因缺乏人类创作者而不具备版权资格的裁决。

It is reported that the plaintiff in this case is Stephen Thaler, a computer scientist from Missouri, who in 2018 applied for federal copyright registration for his AI system "DABUS"'s independently generated visual artwork "A Recent Entrance to Paradise." However, the U.S. Copyright Office rejected the application in 2022, ruling that copyrighted creative works must have a human author. 据悉，本案原告为密苏里州计算机科学家 Stephen Thaler，其曾于 2018 年为其 AI 系统「DABUS」独立生成的视觉艺术作品《A Recent Entrance to Paradise》申请联邦版权注册。但美国版权局在 2022 年驳回了该申请，认定受版权保护的创意作品必须拥有人类作者。

Thaler subsequently filed a lawsuit, and a Washington federal judge upheld the Copyright Office's decision in 2023, stating that human authorship is a "bedrock requirement of copyright." The U.S. Court of Appeals for the D.C. Circuit also affirmed this ruling in 2025. 此后 Thaler 提起诉讼，华盛顿联邦法官于 2023 年维持版权局决定，指出人类身份是「版权的基石要求」，美国联邦哥伦比亚特区巡回上诉法院亦于 2025 年核准了该裁决。

Thaler's legal team, however, argued that the case holds crucial significance in the context of the rapid rise of generative AI, but the U.S. government urged the Supreme Court not to hear the case, pointing out that the term "author" in copyright law clearly refers to humans, not machines. Thaler 的律师团队则认为在生成式 AI 快速崛起的背景下此案具有至关重要的意义，但美国政府敦促最高法院不要受理此案，指出版权法中的「作者」一词明确指向人类而非机器。

item.title: 小米多篇论文入选国际顶会 CVPR 2026
item.guid: 小米多篇论文入选国际顶会-CVPR-2026
item.description:
According to "Xiaomi Technology" news, CVPR 2026 recently announced its paper acceptance results, with a total of 14 of Xiaomi's latest research achievements successfully selected. 据「小米技术」消息，近期 CVPR 2026 公布了论文录用结果，其中小米共有 14 篇最新研究成果成功入选。

Xiaomi introduced that the selected research achievements cover areas such as long video understanding/reasoning, multimodal emotional reasoning, GUI Agent, active intent decision-making, scene Gaussian reconstruction, scene video generation, simulation frameworks, diffusion model applications, and embodied intelligence: 小米方面介绍，本次入选的研究成果涵盖了长视频理解/推理、多模态情感推理、GUI Agent、主动意图决策、场景高斯重建、场景视频生成、仿真框架、扩散模型应用、具身智能等方向：

    AI Large Model Field: Xiaomi has made technological breakthroughs addressing key industry issues such as long video understanding, multimodal emotional reasoning, multimodal safety alignment, GUI Agent, and mobile intelligent agents. The relevant achievements have been applied to Xiaomi's full ecosystem of human-car-home products, comprehensively enhancing the intelligent experience;

    Autonomous Driving Direction: Xiaomi is focused on tackling technical challenges such as world models, 3D reconstruction, long-range modeling, and trajectory planning in extreme scenarios. The relevant technologies have been implemented in Xiaomi's latest combined driving assistance system, significantly improving driving safety and smoothness.

item.title: 💡 荣耀方飞：AI 的终极意义不是取代人类
item.guid: 💡-荣耀方飞：AI-的终极意义不是取代人类
item.description:
Recently, Fang Fei, President of Honor's product line, held a dialogue with Orange Group at MWC 2026, focusing on AI terminals, connectivity, and ecosystem. 日前，荣耀产品线总裁方飞在 MWC 2026 现场，与 Orange 集团围绕 AI 终端、连接和生态展开了对话。

Fang Fei stated on her personal Weibo that she firmly believes the ultimate meaning of AI is not to replace humans, but to serve, accompany, and empower them. She also pointed out that this is the original intention behind Honor's AHI concept of human-AI symbiotic intelligence. 方飞在个人微博表示，其坚信AI 的终极意义不是取代人类，而在于服务人、陪伴人、成就人。同时她也指出，这正是荣耀提出人与 AI 共生智能的 AHI 理念的初心所在。

Fang Fei mentioned in the article that no single company can independently build the future of AI. She also put forward a view: "Future AI experiences will never be limited to a closed 'walled garden,' but must be built on an open and co-creative ecosystem." 方飞在文中提到，没有任何一家公司能独立构建 AI 的未来。其还抛出了一个观点：「未来的 AI 体验，绝不会局限于封闭的『围墙花园』，必须建立在开放共创的生态之上。」

In her Weibo post, Fang Fei also stated that from mobile phones to home furnishings, education, audio, and even pet toys, more diverse and vertical demand scenarios are emerging, and the "Cambrian explosion" era for AI hardware has arrived. 在微博文中，方飞还表示，从手机到家居、教育、音频乃至宠物玩具，更多元、更垂直的需求场景正在涌现，属于 AI 硬件的「寒武纪大爆发」时代已经来临。

item.title: vivo X300 Ultra 实拍样片公布
item.guid: vivo-X300-Ultra-实拍样片公布
item.description:
Yesterday, Han Boxiao, product manager at vivo, announced the imaging capabilities of the vivo X300 Ultra and simultaneously released sample photos. 昨日，vivo 产品经理韩伯啸公布了 vivo X300 Ultra 的影像能力，并同步放出实拍样片。

According to Han Boxiao, the vivo X300 Ultra supports full-focal-length 4K 120 fps 10bit Log/Dolby Vision, and continues to feature full-focal-length OIS optical image stabilization. The new phone also supports APV 422 professional video encoding and is compatible with the ACES professional post-production workflow. 据韩伯啸介绍，vivo X300 Ultra 支持全焦段 4K 120 fps 10bit Log/杜比视界，并且延续全焦段 OIS 光学防抖。新机还支持 APV 422 专业视频编码，适配 ACES 专业后期流程。

Additionally, the new phone will offer a 400mm vivo Zeiss teleconverter lens, a vivo SmallRig professional video expansion kit, and will be equipped with a new professional recording mode Pro. 另外，新机还将提供 400mm vivo 蔡司增距镜、vivo SmallRig 专业视频拓展套件；配备全新专业录像模式 Pro。

item.title: 一加 15T 将搭载极窄物理四等边屏幕
item.guid: 一加-15T-将搭载极窄物理四等边屏幕
item.description:
Yesterday, Li Jie, President of OnePlus China, posted that the OnePlus 15T will be equipped with an ultra-narrow bezel screen. 昨日，一加中国区总裁李杰发文透露，一加 15T 将配备超窄黑边屏幕。

According to his introduction, the OnePlus 15T's screen bezel width is "1.XXmm" and features physically extremely narrow bezels on all four sides. From the comparison image released, the chin of the OnePlus 15T on the left appears narrower than that of the device on the right (suspected to be an iPhone 17 Pro). 据其介绍，一加 15T 屏幕边框宽度为「1.XXmm」，并且为物理极窄四等边。从公布的对比图片来看，左侧的一加 15T 屏幕下巴表现比右侧的机器（疑似 iPhone 17 Pro）更窄。

According to blogger "Digital Chat Station," the OnePlus 15T will be equipped with a 50-megapixel LUMO periscope telephoto lens (equivalent focal length of 85mm), and the body thickness and lens protrusion are still well controlled. 另据博主「数码闲聊站」消息，一加 15T 将配备 5000 万像素的 LUMO 潜望长焦（等效焦段为 85mm），并且机身厚度和镜头凸起依然控制得很好。

item.title: 通义上线新模型，马斯克点赞
item.guid: 通义上线新模型，马斯克点赞
item.description:
Yesterday, Alibaba Cloud's Tongyi officially launched smaller Qwen3.5 models: 0.8B / 2B / 4B / 9B; and introduced them with the slogan "Small yet powerful, light yet fast." 昨日，阿里通义正式推出 Qwen3.5 更小尺寸模型：0.8B / 2B / 4B / 9B ；并打出「小而强，轻而快」的口号。

🔗 Related reading: Musk praises Alibaba AI, 9B parameters take on 120B, overseas netizens: Is this called a small model? 🔗 相关阅读： 马斯克大赞阿里 AI，9B 参数硬刚 120B，海外网友：这叫小模型？

According to the introduction, the models launched this time are all based on the unified Qwen3.5 foundation, natively support multimodal capabilities, are open-source and commercially available under Apache 2.0, support LoRA/full fine-tuning, and can be adapted for tasks using consumer-grade graphics cards. 据介绍，本次推出的模型全系基于 Qwen3.5 统一基座，原生支持多模态，Apache 2.0 开源可商用，支持 LoRA/全量微调，消费级显卡即可启动任务适配。

It is worth mentioning that the entire Qwen 3.5 series simultaneously supports a context window of up to 260,000 Tokens and introduces a dual mode of "thinking" and "non-thinking," allowing flexible switching between deep logical reasoning and rapid response. 值得一提的是，Qwen 3.5 全系列同时支持长达 26 万 Token 的上下文窗口，并引入「思考」与「非思考」双模式，可在深度逻辑推理与快速响应之间灵活切换。

At the new model launch event, Musk also retweeted on X, stating "Impressive intelligence density." 在新模型发布会，马斯克还在 X 转发并表示「Impressive intelligence density」（令人印象深刻的智能密度）。

item.title: 蔚来 ES9 技术发布会定档 4 月 9 日
item.guid: 蔚来-ES9-技术发布会定档-4-月-9-日
item.description:
On March 3rd, William Li, founder, chairman, and CEO of NIO, announced during a Lantern Festival live broadcast that the technical launch event for the NIO ES9, the most technologically advanced SUV on the market this year, will officially take place on April 9th. 3 月 3 日，蔚来创始人、董事长、CEO 李斌在元宵节直播中宣布，今年市场上技术最先进的 SUV——蔚来 ES9 技术发布会将于 4 月 9 日正式举行。

As the culmination of eleven years of NIO's technological innovation, the ES9 is equipped with several industry-leading core technologies, including: 作为蔚来十一年技术创新的集大成之作，ES9 搭载多项行业领先的核心技术，包括：

  • The first steer-by-wire system to obtain national mass production approval - Tianxing Steer-by-Wire; 首个获得国家量产许可的线控转向系统——天行线控转向；
  • The world's first integrated hydraulic fully active suspension system - Tianxing Fully Active Suspension; 全球首个集成式液压全主动悬架系统——天行全主动悬架；
  • China's first vehicle-wide full-domain operating system "SkyOS·Tian Shu"; 中国首个整车全域操作系统「SkyOS·天枢」；
  • Self-developed high-level intelligent driving chip "Shenji NX9031" and a full-domain 900V high-voltage architecture, etc. 自研高阶智驾芯片「神玑 NX9031」以及全域 900V 高压架构等。

With its commanding presence, elegant and refined design, and globally leading core technologies, the ES9 will bring users a premium executive travel experience across all scenarios. ES9 将以极具气场的体量尺寸，优雅得体、纯粹精致的设计和全球领先的核心技术，为用户带来全场景尊崇的行政级出行体验。

More information will be fully revealed at the technical launch event on April 9th, so please stay tuned. 更多信息将于 4 月 9 日技术发布会全面揭晓，敬请期待。

item.title: PICO 下一代 XR 旗舰产品将在今年发售
item.guid: PICO-下一代-XR-旗舰产品将在今年发售
item.description:
Recently, Ma Jiesi, PICO OS Product Lead, announced that 'Project Swan' will be PICO's next-generation XR flagship product, and the new product will be launched globally this year. 日前，PICO OS 产品负责人马杰思发文宣布，「Project Swan」将会是 PICO 下一代 XR 旗舰产品，并且新品将于今年全球发售。

According to reports, Project Swan will adopt a dual-chip architecture: equipped with a flagship main SoC, its CPU performance will be 133% higher and GPU performance 127% higher compared to the existing XR Gen2. 据介绍，Project Swan 将采用双芯片架构：配备旗舰级主 SoC，相较于现有的 XR Gen2，CPU 性能提升 133%，GPU 性能提升 127%。

Additionally, there is a PICO Silicon self-developed chip, integrating multiple self-developed computing units, which has undergone deep collaborative optimization for real-time perception, spatial computing, and imaging processing, enabling stable head and eye tracking, with an end-to-end system latency of only 12 milliseconds. 另有一枚 PICO Silicon 自研芯片，集成多项自研计算单元，针对实时感知、空间计算与成像处理进行了深度协同优化，能实现稳定的头动眼动追踪，并且整个系统的端到端延迟只有 12 毫秒。

Project Swan will also be equipped with a newly customized next-generation MicroOLED screen, with an average PPD of up to 40, and central vision reaching 45 PPD. Project Swan 还将配备全新定制的新一代 MicroOLED 屏幕，平均 PPD 高达 40，且中心视觉可达 45 PPD。

item.title: lululemon 推出 2026 春季跑装备
item.guid: lululemon-推出-2026-春季跑装备
item.description:
Yesterday, athletic lifestyle brand lululemon launched its 2026 Spring running gear, with the classic FAST AND FREE™ running series and SWIFTLY™ series getting a refresh: 昨日，运动生活方式品牌 lululemon 推出 2026 春季跑装备，经典 FAST AND FREE™ 跑步系列、SWIFTLY™ 系列焕新：

    The classic FAST AND FREE™ tights use Nulux™ fabric; the 6-inch and 8-inch shorts have silicone designs at the bottom of the lining to reduce rolling; the FAST AND FREE™ sports vest features a new ventilated knit mesh; both tights and sports vests are available in men's and women's styles.

    The classic SWIFTLY™ series features a refreshed design language, incorporating retro elements like stripes and leopard print into its functional fabrics. Additionally, this series utilizes Silverescent™ technology powered by X-STATIC®, ensuring the gear remains dry even after exercise.

In addition, lululemon simultaneously launched running community events in 16 cities, with lululemon ambassadors and community partners joining together to experience the joy of running. 另外，lululemon 同步开启 16 城跑步社区活动，lululemon 大使和社区伙伴相伴，共同感受跑起来的乐趣。

item.title: Beats 开售 iPhone 17e 专用保护壳
item.guid: Beats-开售-iPhone-17e-专用保护壳
item.description:
Recently, Beats officially announced the launch of MagSafe-compatible Beats iPhone 17e protective cases, now available in Rock Blue and Light Rock Gray. 日前，Beats 正式宣布推出兼容 MagSafe 的 Beats iPhone 17e 专用保护壳，现有磐岩蓝和浅岩灰可供选择。

As significant new additions to the iPhone protective case series, these two popular colorways are specially designed for the new iPhone 17e and are available for order on the Apple official website starting today, priced at RMB 399. 作为 iPhone 保护壳系列的重磅新品，这两款人气配色专为全新 iPhone 17e 而设计，即日起可通过苹果官网订购，售价为人民币 399 元。

The MagSafe-compatible Beats iPhone 17e protective case features a sturdy polycarbonate back shell paired with an elastic frame, and an internal microfiber lining. 兼容 MagSafe 的 Beats iPhone 17e 专用保护壳采用坚固的聚碳酸酯背壳搭配弹性边框，以及内部拥有超细纤维内衬。

item.title: 《逆水寒》手游官宣与猪猪侠联动
item.guid: 《逆水寒》手游官宣与猪猪侠联动
item.description:
Yesterday, the mobile game 'Justice Online' announced that it will launch a collaboration with 'GG Bond' this Friday (March 6th). 昨日，《逆水寒》手游宣布，将在本周五（3 月 6 日）开启与猪猪侠的联动。

It is reported that this collaboration will include 'GG Bond/Princess Feifei Impression Outfits', collaboration voice packs/titles/emojis, collaboration pets (including GG Bond, Princess Feifei, Super Q), chessboard skins, theme music, and more. 据悉，本次联动内容包含「猪猪侠/菲菲公主印象时装」、联动语音包/称号/表情包、联动宠物（含猪猪侠、菲菲公主、超人强）、棋盘皮肤、主题音乐等。

item.title: 纪录电影《登月》（第一部）定档 4 月
item.guid: 纪录电影《登月》（第一部）定档-4-月
item.description:
According to Sina Film, the documentary film 'Moon Landing' (Part 1) has officially announced its release date for April 24th, China Space Day. 据新浪电影消息，纪录电影《登月》（第一部）官宣定档 4 月 24 日中国航天日。

The film is set against the backdrop of the Chang'e-6 lunar far side sample return mission, bringing the camera from the grand engineering project closer to the daily work of the aerospace personnel behind the scenes. 据介绍，影片以嫦娥六号月背采样任务为背景，将镜头从宏大工程拉近至幕后航天人的工作日常。

item.title: 《奇迹梦之队》发布中国独家艺术海报
item.guid: 《奇迹梦之队》发布中国独家艺术海报
item.description:
Recently, Sony Pictures Animation's film 'The Miracle Dream Team' released its exclusive Chinese art poster and will be screened in mainland China on March 14th. 日前，索尼动画电影《奇迹梦之队》发布中国独家艺术海报，将于 3 月 14 日内地上映。

It is reported that the film was created by the Sony Animation team behind 'Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse', with Unanimous Media, founded by Curry, participating in the production; the voice cast includes multiple NBA and WNBA players such as Caleb McLaughlin, Gabrielle Union, and Stephen Curry. 据悉，该片由制作《蜘蛛侠：纵横宇宙》的索尼动画团队打造，库里创立的 Unanimous Media 参与制作；配音阵容涵盖凯莱布·麦克劳克林、加布里埃尔·尤尼恩、斯蒂芬·库里等多位 NBA 与 WNBA 球员。

The film tells the story of Will, a small goat who dreams of becoming a professional player. Despite his naturally small stature, he breaks into his dream team with extraordinary skills. Facing big, fierce beasts on the field and doubts from teammates, he leads this struggling team to overcome difficulties. The plot focuses on Will encountering challenges from 5 wild teammates and confronting his rival, Mane King, ultimately proving the power of teamwork through collaboration. 影片讲述梦想成为职业球手的小山羊威尔，虽然天生身材矮小却凭借超凡球技闯入梦寐以求的球队，面对来自凶猛赛场的大块头猛兽和队友质疑，带领这支成绩堪忧的球队突破困境的故事。剧情聚焦威尔遭遇 5 位狂野队友的挑战，并与劲敌马鬃王展开对抗，最终通过团结协作证明团队力量。

item.title: 《惊声尖笑 6》首曝预告
item.guid: 《惊声尖笑-6》首曝预告
item.description:
According to Deadline Hollywood, the first trailer for "Scary Movie 6," the sequel to the popular horror-comedy film, has been released. 据守望好莱坞消息，热门恐怖喜剧片续集《惊声尖笑 6》首曝预告。

It is reported that the film's main purpose is to "parody and mock," clumsily ridiculing multiple movies, including "Scream," "I Know What You Did Last Summer," "The Blair Witch Project," "The Usual Suspects," "Shakespeare in Love," and others. 据悉，影片主要以「恶搞、戏弄」为宗旨，将多部电影拙劣地愚弄一番，包括《惊声尖叫》、《我知道你去年夏天干了什么》、《女巫布莱尔》、《普通嫌疑犯》、《恋爱中的莎士比亚》等。

The film is directed by Michael Tiddes and stars Anna Faris, Regina Hall, Marlon Wayans, and others. It is expected to be released in North America on June 12. 该片由迈克尔·泰兹执导，安娜·法瑞丝、雷吉娜·赫尔、马龙·韦恩斯等主演，预计 6 月 12 日北美上映。

早报
